additional_prompt: now, do the same [AS FOR THE COVERED SCENARIOS] for not covered. In case the scenario is not covered due to missing information, it is fine to exclude some of the customer data. also leave out the email field

not_covered.title: Cosmetic scratch or dent only
not_covered.description: Small scratch on screen; phone works normally.

policy_references.snippet: cosmetic damage… scratches and dents… that do not otherwise affect functionality

not_covered.title: Lost or stolen iPhone
not_covered.description: Phone missing after commute; cannot be returned to Apple.

policy_references.snippet: does not apply to a Covered iPhone that has been lost or stolen
This Plan only covers a Covered iPhone that is returned to Apple in its entirety.

not_covered.title: Intentional or reckless damage

policy_references.snippet: does not include… theft, misplacement, reckless, abusive, willful or intentional conduct

not_covered.reasoning: ADH excludes reckless/intentional conduct; no coverage.

not_covered.title: Third-party repair caused damage
not_covered.description: After non-Apple screen replacement, True Tone and Face ID fail.

policy_references.snippet: service… performed by anyone who is not… Apple or an AASP

not_covered.reasoning: Damage from unauthorized service is excluded.

not_covered.title: Battery at ~70% of original capacity
not_covered.description: Battery degraded but not to the 50% threshold.

policy_references.snippet: battery… depleted fifty (50%) percent or more

not_covered.reasoning: Depletion <50% is outside the stated coverage.

not_covered.title: Earthquake/fire damage
not_covered.description: Device destroyed in a house fire.

policy_references.snippet: damage caused by… fire, earthquake or other external causes except as described in 3.2

not_covered.reasoning: Catastrophic external causes are excluded; not ADH.

not_covered.title: Pre-existing crack before buying Plan
not_covered.description: Screen was cracked before AppleCare+ purchase; user tries to claim after buying Plan.

policy_references.snippet: does not apply to a pre-existing condition… if you purchased the Plan after you purchased the Covered iPhone

not_covered.title: Loaner/temporary replacement request
not_covered.description: Customer requests a loaner while phone is being serviced.

policy_references.snippet: does not apply to… provision of equipment while the Covered iPhone is being serviced

not_covered.reasoning: The Plan explicitly excludes providing equipment during service.
